billingconductor.billinggroup.CfnAbout: Creates a billing group that resembles a consolidated billing family that AWS charges, based off of the predefined pricing plan computation.

billingconductor.billinggroup.AccountGro.Description: The set of accounts that will be under the billing group. The set of accounts resemble the linked accounts in a consolidated billing family.

billingconductor.billinggroup.Computatio.Description: The preferences and settings that will be used to compute the AWScharges for a billing group.

billingconductor.billinggroup.Descriptio.Description: The description of the billing group.

billingconductor.billinggroup.PrimaryAcc.Description: The account ID that serves as the main account in a billing group.

billingconductor.billinggroup.Tags.Description: A map that contains tag keys and tag values that are attached to a billing group.
